commands.review_summary:
The branch adds data-handling policy conformance/state/docs, updates session-maintenance default docs, and tightens Policy validation so unsupported policy keys are reported instead of ignored.

PR surface: Source +1083, Tests +577, Docs +50. Total +1710 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: policy compare maps policyContainerShapeFindings, while the new nested dataHandling unsupported-key checks are only reached by the doctor/check dataHandling path. I did not run a live CLI repro because this review is read-only and the source path is direct.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] This needs author and maintainer handling because the branch has concrete compare/docs blockers, insufficient external real behavior proof, and a maintainer-labeled compatibility strictness decision.
